ip_outcome_note: Depicted figure is Son Goku in Super Saiyan transformation. Card name explicitly names 'Son Goku'; the golden spiky hair, orange-and-dark gi, and screaming mid-transformation energy-burst composition are canonical visual identifiers of the Son Goku character across all Toriyama/Toei Dragon Ball franchise output. The DBS-B01 Galactic Battle card database confirms the Bandai character tag 'Son Goku' for BT1-059. IP verified.

trivia_bullets.text: Galactic Battle (DBS-B01) was the inaugural booster set for the Dragon Ball Super Card Game, released July 28, 2017 — the card game's first commercial release. The set's 114-card pool spans the Battle of Gods, Resurrection F, and Universe 6 Tournament arcs of Dragon Ball Super, as well as the original Broly film continuity, establishing the multi-arc cross-set design pattern that every subsequent DBS-B series would follow. [WebSearch: TCDB 2017 Dragon Ball Super Card Game BT1 Galactic Battle]
sources: TCDB: 2017 Dragon Ball Super Card Game BT1 Galactic Battle
WebSearch snippet: Galactic Battle Checklist, Bleeding Cool

trivia_bullets.text: BT1-059 is a Super Rare Green Battle card with 25,000 Power and an Evolve ability (GGG2: Son Goku) that grants [Double Strike]. A [Permanent] effect upgrades this to [Triple Strike] if Krillin is in the player's Drop Area, rewarding deck-building investment in the Turtle School ensemble. Its [Auto] on-play wipes any number of the opponent's Battle Cards whose combined cost does not exceed 6 — a sweeper effect significant in the format's early-game field development. [TrollAndToad card listing; WebSearch snippet: DBS BT1-059 abilities]
sources: TrollAndToad: Awakening Rage Son Goku BT1-059
WebSearch snippet: DBS BT1-059 card abilities

trivia_bullets.text: The card depicts Son Goku in a Super Saiyan awakening moment — the mid-scream full-body energy eruption that is one of the most iconic recurring visual motifs in Toei Animation's Dragon Ball Z and Dragon Ball Super production. Bandai's character tag for BT1-059 is 'Son Goku' (the standard Z-and-DBS canonical adult continuity), era: Frieza Saga, consistent with the set's Resurrection F story arc coverage. The 'Awakening Rage' title directly references the emotional trigger for Super Saiyan transformation in Dragon Ball Z canon — extreme emotional distress as the catalyst for Saiyan power escalation. [dbs-cardgame.com card database; Dragon Ball Wiki: Super Saiyan]

Son Goku's Super Saiyan Blue (SSGSS) form was the promotional centerpiece of Galactic Battle's marketing; BT1-030 and BT1-032 are the set's two dedicated SSB Goku prints at Rare and Super Rare respectively. BT1-059 occupies the earlier Super Saiyan transformation tier in the same set — the design team layered Goku's canonical transformation stages across multiple rarity slots, reflecting Bandai's intent to make the first set a showcase of the franchise's full transformation arc. [Bleeding Cool: Dragon Ball Super Card Game Galactic Battle Checklist]
sources: Bleeding Cool: Dragon Ball Super Card Game Galactic Battle Checklist
